title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NIIT Foundation - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NIIT Foundation - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the NIIT Foundation family as a Curriculum Developer in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NIIT Foundation:
NIIT Foundation is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Foundation!
